race.comment: SIPPA SPRITZ (12) looks the one to beat. Has raced twice, both in far richer company, the latest fifth at Belmont Park in rain-affected ground. This is by far the easiest assignment yet and expected to go close. ROCK THE FOX (3) ran very well on debut then a little below that last time. Meets a moderate line-up and is drawn to feature. PEANUT BUTTER (1) is fitter for two runs in and hasn't been far away at both. Gets a chance to find the frame. CHE FIGATA (2) was beaten a length over this course and distance last time and can only be fitter. Must include on that. WREXHAM (4) ran a much better race fresh and can play a major role.
